name: Curried Shrimp - Goong Pad Pong Garee
recipeIngredient: ¼ cup slivered green bell pepper
¼ cup slivered red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet and add the oil, garlic, and shrimp. Saute for 1 minute.
2. Add all the other ingredients and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Serve with steamed jasmine rice.
